args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL;
